title: A-jang.com
synopsis: The spirit world, the real world and the Internet cyber world maintain peace and harmony by the Dimension stone, which was created by the three deities named Dragon King, Zeus and Zoolu. One day, Doddery had a date therefore he switched the stone guard duty with the Super Baby by bribing him with milk. A-jang fights hard with LuPin and Pigu till the end but in that process something goes wrong with the Dimension Stone and due to that unusual energy Spirit world becomes chaotic. Many spirits including LuPin and Pigu falls into cyber space and A-jang just manages to escape. (Source: tvkanald.rs)

title: Yu Tong
synopsis: An old fisherman catches a fish bowl from the sea, the fishing child painted on the bowl comes out to reality to catch a lot of pearls for him. A missionary wants to occupy the bowl and is punished by the fishing child.

title: Shunmao Monogatari Tao Tao
titleNative: シュンマオ物語 タオタオ
synonyms: The Story of Panda Tao Tao
synopsis: TaoTao is an anime series about the eponymous Taotao, a small panda. In the stories, Taotao has adventures with his animal friends and listens to the stories of his mother, the mommy panda. It was produced as a Chinese-Japanese joint venture.

title: Kumo no Ito (2000)
synopsis: Kandata was a thief in life so he suffers in hell because of it. But once before he died he helped a spider. One day a silk thread comes down from above and Kandata attempts to climb it in order to reach paradise but...

title: Straw-saurus Neo
titleNative: ストローザウルス ネオ
synopsis: "Straw-saurus Neo is a small dinosaur from space. He came looking for his friend who has gone missing and sets out to find him in the sandy wilds of the planet." Short animation starring dinosaurs made from straws broadcasted on NHK Educational TV.

title: The Great Warrior Wall
synopsis: The main character of ‘The Great Wall Warrior’ is a wolf raised up by herbivores. The adventure starts with his pure mind of being the hero who can save the world from the Giant Warrior, but he has unconsciously involved in some big scheme… (Source: 2:10 Animation)

title: The Kind Devil
synopsis: Foo, a kind boy, lives together with his grandmother. However, Foo has no friends. One day, as Foo is off picking herbs on a mountain to treat his grandmother's illness, he finds himself lost. But then he is saved by a boy demon with bright-red skin named Smoochy. The two kind yet friendless boys meet and become each other's first friend. The two begin to spend their days playing together, until one day Foo suddenly stops coming to the mountain. An Amazon Prime Japan Video exclusive. (Source: Official YouTube channel)

title: A World Worth Protecting
synopsis: By the year 3029 CE, Earth's technology has developed rapidly, borders no longer exist, and Earth has been unified, marking the beginning of the era of the Federation. At that time, a huge sword flew from the heavens, piercing the sun and causing a huge sensation on Earth. Perhaps because the scabbard of the sword was already in tatters, countless shards have broken off from it following the collision with the sun and spread across the universe. Many of these shards have landed on various places across Earth. With the arrival of the bronze sword and its shards, a new unlimited energy source has suddenly appeared on Earth. This energy source has since been named Spirit Qi. Spirit Qi is like air, thick in some places and thin in others. As the Federation and other factions gather more shards, they discover more information on cultivation, pill refinement, Spirit Stone refinement, and other techniques. title: The Collected Animations of ICAF (2001-2006)
synopsis: A collection of the best entries shown at the annual Inter-College Animation Festival from 2001 to 2006. For many animation students in Japan participating in the festival is a chance to start their professional careers. The entries include works made using various animation techniques, including CGI and stop-motion. Taku Furukawa, Katayama Masahiro and Kihune Tokumitsu can be found among the judges of the festival.

title: On-chan
titleNative: onちゃん夢パワー大冒険！
synopsis: On-chan and his friends from the planet Parade in space happen to meet Kenta and Haruka in the middle of a pasture, who are on their way from Tokyo to Sapporo. On-chan and his friends travel with them to help them find their new home in Sapporo, but they find many obstacles in their way. At first, Kenta is rebellious, but soon he is influenced by the power of On-chan's dreams....

title: Tiandao Tushuguan
synopsis: Traversing into another world, Zhang Xuan finds himself becoming an honorable teacher. Along with his transcension, a mysterious library appears in his mind. As long as it is something he has seen, regardless of whether it is a human or an object, a book on its weaknesses will be automatically compiled in the library. Thus, he becomes formidable.

title: Jeremy no Ki
synopsis: Based on a children's picture book of the same name. A Christmas tale about a bird who was raised by tree after it was abandoned. The tree was then cut down for people in the city to use for Christmas celebrations. The bird desperately is trying to find its adoptive tree mother with the help of Jeremy, a penniless orphan, who heard her story so they go and search every tree being used in town. The search in the cold takes a toll on Jeremy until Santa Claus appears, but is it really him?

title: Chieri and Cherry
synopsis: Chieri, an imaginative girl, and her imaginary friend Cherry meet a new group of friends at her grandmother's house, and they build memories together. Note: The film received an early screening at the 2015 Tokyo International Film Festival on October 24, 2015. Regular screenings began on February 20, 2016.
